name: streaming-fix

tasks.title: Rewrite replayJSON to stream and decompress
tasks.description: Rewrite replayJSON to stream and decompress
tasks.body: Replace os.ReadFile with os.Open + buffered scanning in replayJSON (cmd/daemon/follow.go). For paths ending in .gz, wrap the file handle in a gzip.NewReader before scanning, matching the pattern in ReplayReader.readFile (internal/logrender/reader.go:44-59). Each line should be written to stdout individually rather than the entire file contents at once. Ensure gzip readers and file handles are closed properly (defer).

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in streaming-fix is complete and correct

audit_enrichment: Verify no os.ReadFile calls remain in replayJSON
Verify .gz files produce decompressed NDJSON output, not raw gzip bytes

breadcrumbs.text: Rewrote replayJSON to stream lines via bufio.Scanner and decompress .gz files via gzip.NewReader, matching ReplayReader.readFile pattern

Audit reviewed 1 file (cmd/daemon/follow.go, 218 lines). PASS. replayJSONFile mirrors ReplayReader.readFile exactly: open, optional gzip.NewReader, bufio.Scanner with 1MB cap, deferred cleanup. Error-skip semantics in replayJSON preserved from the original. scanner.Err() properly surfaced. os.Stdout.Write return values discarded on lines 198-199, standard practice matching the rest of the file. Build clean, all tests pass, vet and gofmt clean. No findings warranting remediation.

audit.result_summary: Rewrote replayJSON in cmd/daemon/follow.go to stream NDJSON lines via bufio.Scanner and decompress .gz files on the fly with gzip.NewReader, eliminating the previous os.ReadFile slurp that loaded entire files into memory. The implementation mirrors the established ReplayReader.readFile pattern with identical buffer sizing, gzip detection, and error semantics. Audit passed with no findings: build clean, tests green, vet and format clean.

task-0001.objective: Rewrite replayJSON to stream lines and decompress .gz files instead of slurping entire files into memory
task-0001.what_happened: Extracted the per-file logic into replayJSONFile, which opens the file, optionally wraps it in gzip.NewReader for .gz paths, and scans line-by-line with bufio.Scanner. Added bufio, compress/gzip, io, and strings imports. The pattern mirrors ReplayReader.readFile exactly.
went_well: Minimal diff: one function split into two, same error-skip semantics preserved
improvements: No tests exist specifically for replayJSON; the sibling test-coverage node should add them
action_items: The test-coverage node (fix-replayjson-streaming-bug/test-coverage) should add tests for both plain and .gz replay paths
